text: Being here, I feel both curious and contemplative. The glass walls and clean, open space evoke a sense of transparency and potential, as if inviting me to cross from the known into the realm of ideas. Inside, the vibrant exhibit pulls my attention, filled with symbols, texts, and colors. The atmosphere is one of anticipation, as though knowledge and innovation are ready to reveal themselves if I simply engage. I am aware of my own presence as observer and participant, suspended between inquiry and discovery.
